description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden storage box constructed from thick, vertically aligned planks reinforced with metal riveted bands at the edges. The wood grain is clearly visible, with natural knots and texture, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The box is deep and capacious, suitable for storing tools, equipment, or other items in an urban or industrial setting. The top appears to be solid and flat, with no visible hinges or openings, suggesting a fixed or removable lid. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, emphasizing its simple, functional design. The dark brown coloration and sturdy build make it ideal for placement in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden storage box reinforced with metal bands, featuring a rustic, utilitarian design and no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: The front view shows the vertical wood planks and two prominent metal-reinforced edges, with visible wood grain and rivets.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the flat, uninterrupted wooden surface and the metal bands running along the edges.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same wood plank pattern and metal edge reinforcements.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the flat wooden surface and metal bands, similar to view 1.
